questionHtml: Outline a reason that the orca whale would be difficult to represent in a pyramid of energy.
markschemeHtml: orca is in different trophic levels depending on its food source;

C4.2.12. Reductions in energy availability at each successive stage in food chains due to large energy losses between trophic levels
